changeSet.author: custom
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO plugins ( identifier, name, description, javascriptModuleFile, functionsViewTemplate, settingsViewTemplate, namelocalizationkey, settingsPermission, functionsPermission, deviceFunctionsPermission, enabledForDevice ) VALUES ( 'deviceremote', 'Device Remote', 'Unattended remote control via Headwind Remote (aPuppet)', 'app/components/plugins/deviceremote/deviceremote.module.js', 'app/components/plugins/deviceremote/views/deviceremote.html', 'app/components/plugins/deviceremote/views/deviceremote.settings.html', 'plugin.deviceremote.localization.key.name', 'plugin_deviceremote_access', 'plugin_deviceremote_access', 'plugin_deviceremote_access', TRUE );

changeSet.author: custom
custom
custom
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE plugin_deviceremote_session ( id serial NOT NULL CONSTRAINT plugin_deviceremote_session_pr_key PRIMARY KEY, customerId INT NOT NULL REFERENCES customers (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, deviceId INT NOT NULL UNIQUE REFERENCES devices (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, sessionId VARCHAR(32), password VARCHAR(16), status VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'idle', agentStatus VARCHAR(32), requestedAt BIGINT, updatedAt BIGINT );
